title: Rich Silky Thai Potatoes Yum Salad
description: A nutty and silky Thai dish featuring charlotte potatoes, perfect for a brunch mood, made with double-fry KFC style potatoes and halal-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Charlotte potatoes
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Double fry the potato cubes by blanching them in the hot oil for 3 minutes, then removing them and increasing the oil temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Fry the potato cubes again until golden brown and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Drain the fried potatoes on paper towels and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the fish sauce, lime juice, palm sugar, and chili flakes.
Add the fried potatoes, chopped roasted peanuts, and chopped fresh cilantro to the bowl and toss to combine.
Season the salad with salt to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good toss and adjust the seasoning if needed.
